goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'centre' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'hotel type' and 'address'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'polynesian' food and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
The restaurant should be in the 'same price range as the hotel'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'british' food.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '19:15' on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the centre and should have a star of 4
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the expensive price range
Make sure you get hotel type and address
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve polynesian food and should be in the same area as the hotel
The restaurant should be in the same price range as the hotel
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 19:15 on wednesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
